name: franpass87/fp-digital-marketing-suite
description: Digital Marketing Suite - WordPress plugin/theme toolkit

scripts.phpcs: vendor/bin/phpcs || ./vendor/squizlabs/php_codesniffer/bin/phpcs || echo 'PHPCS not found - run composer install'
scripts.phpcbf: vendor/bin/phpcbf || ./vendor/squizlabs/php_codesniffer/bin/phpcbf || echo 'PHPCBF not found - run composer install'
scripts.phpstan: vendor/bin/phpstan analyse || php vendor/phpstan/phpstan/phpstan analyse || echo 'PHPStan not found - run composer install'
